data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. BANG ON TIME made a solid debut run last time out when finishing second over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Having now had racing experience can go one better. 9. PINK PERSUASION returns from a three-and-a-half-month spell. Has had the benefit of two trials leading into this and fresh-up having placed in that state in the past is worth considering. 12. STREET FORCE was sent out at long odds on debut last time out and finished a close sixth over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Racing fitter must be respected. 7. LE SMOKE is a three-year-old filly who is having her first start from the Kris Lees stable Most recently finished in the placings at New Plymouth Raceway before going out for a spell. Fitter for placing in a recent Scone trial and is a top-three chance. Include in combinations.","runners":[1,9,12,7],"exclusive":true}
